triage_rows.direction: keep_the_outer controller on_the_existing_polling cadence when the runtime-envelope change signal remains stable
update_the_outer scheduler cadence immediately when suggested_poll_interval_change flips state
refresh_the_requested upper target when reopen_target_change flips state

interpretation: This is the topmost change detector for the runtime-stack control-loop runtime envelope.
An outer controller can watch it to know when polling cadence or reopening targets changed without reparsing the runtime envelope itself.
